nasb.text: But the angel said to them, “Do not be afraid; for behold, I bring you good news of great joy which will be for all the people;

esv.text: And the angel said to them, “Fear not, for behold, I bring you good news of great joy that will be for all the people.

cnv.text: 天使說：“不要怕！看哪！我報給你們大喜的信息，是關於萬民的：

ccb.text: 天使对他们说：“不要怕！我告诉你们一个有关万民的大喜讯，

csbs.text: 那位天使对他们说：“不要怕！因为看哪，我传给你们一个大喜的信息，是要给万民的。
